steps.message: Swipe toward any open exit to move. The minimap pips and connecting lines show nearby routes.
Tap a highlighted character name to start a conversation.
Tap the dialogue card to continue the conversation and advance the story.
Highlighted room details are interactive. Tap one to inspect it or use its available action.
At Jed's workbench, choose the Functional Cryo-Inductor recipe or tap a slot to pick the item you want to repair.
Check the requirements, add any missing parts, then press Craft when the bench is ready.
That bandage slipped. Hold until the pulse enters the green window.
Head out of the Pit toward Jed's Workshop. Tap highlighted exits or swipe toward open connections to keep moving.
Open your journal from the menu to track active errands and choose which quest to follow.
Use the journal tabs to review active quests, completed quests, and recent updates.
Use the bottom menu button, then choose Inventory to review supplies, gear, and key items.
Use the Supplies, Gear, and Key Items tabs across the top. Tap an entry to inspect or use it.
You can save from the menu. Open the bottom menu anytime, then choose Save to store your progress.
Beds aboard the Astra restore the party. Use Nova's bed when the crew needs to recover between missions.
Source Art unlocked: Blast Wave. Relic techniques are powerful skills with longer cooldowns.
Tap a portrait to switch the active character. Each party member has unique skills.
Snacks are reusable combat tools. Use them like skills - they recharge after a cooldown.
